\section{\sc Selected Open-Source Software, Benchmarks, and Systems}
\vspace{-0.08in}
{\small
Representative open-source research artifacts spanning anomaly detection, trustworthy AI, agent security, and research tooling.
\vspace{-0.08in}

\subsubsection*{Primary Contributions}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.12em,topsep=0.1em]
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/yzhao062/pyod}{PyOD}} (\textit{Library}; updated Apr. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{9.8K stars}) A Python library for outlier and anomaly detection, integrating classical and deep learning methods with a unified interface. Links: \href{https://pyod.readthedocs.io}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12154}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/yzhao062/anomaly-detection-resources}{Anomaly-Detection-Resources}} (\textit{Resource Hub}; updated Mar. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{9.2K stars}) A curated resource hub for anomaly detection, including papers, benchmarks, tutorials, datasets, tools, and community references.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/yzhao062/cs-paper-checklist}{CS-Paper-Checklist}} (\textit{Research Toolkit}; updated May. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{1.6K stars}) A practical sanity checklist for improving CS paper quality, structure, and submission readiness.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/pygod-team/pygod}{PyGOD}} (\textit{Library}; updated Nov. 2024; \textcolor{uscred}{1.5K stars}) A Python library for graph outlier detection, with unified APIs and broad coverage of graph anomaly detection algorithms. Links: \href{https://docs.pygod.org}{docs} | \href{http://jmlr.org/papers/v25/23-0963.html}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/Minqi824/ADBench}{ADBench}} (\textit{Benchmark}; updated Jan. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{1.0K stars}) Official benchmark for anomaly detection with large-scale evaluations across unsupervised, semi-supervised, and supervised settings. Links: \href{https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper_files/paper/2022/hash/da0ddd47c18ae3dd2888ff2ea4b6ccf7-Abstract-Datasets_and_Benchmarks.html}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/yzhao062/combo}{combo}} (\textit{Library}; updated Jan. 2023; \textcolor{uscred}{659 stars}) A Python toolbox for machine learning model and score combination across classification, clustering, and anomaly detection tasks. Links: \href{https://pycombo.readthedocs.io}{docs} | \href{https://aaai.org/papers/13648-combining-machine-learning-models-using-combo-library/}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/yzhao062/SUOD}{SUOD}} (\textit{Library / System}; updated Mar. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{392 stars}) An acceleration framework for large-scale unsupervised heterogeneous outlier detection with efficient training and inference. Links: \href{https://suod.readthedocs.io}{docs} | \href{https://proceedings.mlsys.org/paper_files/paper/2021/hash/da9d70f7f98f0f660f24f6f3d9e7b0f1-Abstract.html}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/Justin0504/Aegis}{Aegis}} (\textit{Security / Compliance Platform}; updated Apr. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{339 stars}) The open-source firewall for AI agents, with pre-execution policy checks, human-in-the-loop approvals, and tamper-evident audit trails for safer and more accountable deployment. Links: \href{https://viterbi-web.usc.edu/~yzhao010/aegis.html}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.12621}{paper} | \href{https://github.com/Justin0504/Aegis/blob/main/docs/images/readme_demo1.gif}{demo}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/HeadyZhang/agent-audit}{agent-audit}} (\textit{Security Toolkit}; updated Apr. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{142 stars}) An open-source tool for AI auditing and assurance in agent systems, with OWASP Agentic Top 10 coverage, taint analysis, and MCP configuration auditing. Links: \href{https://viterbi-web.usc.edu/~yzhao010/agent-audit.html}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.22853}{paper} | \href{https://pypi.org/project/agent-audit/}{demo}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/USC-FORTIS/AD-AGENT}{AD-AGENT}} (\textit{Platform}; updated Mar. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{97 stars}) An LLM-driven multi-agent anomaly detection platform for end-to-end workflows across tabular, graph, and time-series settings. Links: \href{https://usc-fortis.github.io/AD-AGENT/}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.12594}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/USC-FORTIS/AD-LLM}{AD-LLM}} (\textit{Benchmark}; updated Oct. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{42 stars}) A benchmark for using large language models in anomaly detection, covering zero-shot detection, data augmentation, and model selection. Links: \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.11142}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/USC-FORTIS/NLP-ADBench}{NLP-ADBench}} (\textit{Benchmark}; updated Oct. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{21 stars}) A benchmark for anomaly detection in NLP, including NLPAD datasets and standardized evaluation across end-to-end and embedding-based methods. Links: \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.04784}{paper}.
\end{itemize}
\vspace{-0.1in}

\subsubsection*{Selected Collaborations}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*,itemsep=0.12em,topsep=0.1em]
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/datamllab/tods}{TODS}} (\textit{System / AutoML}; updated Sep. 2023; \textcolor{uscred}{1.7K stars}) An automated time-series outlier detection system with end-to-end pipeline support for preprocessing, feature extraction, model search, and detection. Links: \href{http://tods-doc.github.io}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.09822}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/mims-harvard/TDC}{TDC}} (\textit{Benchmark / Platform}; updated Jul. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{1.2K stars}) Therapeutics Data Commons, a platform for AI-ready therapeutic datasets, benchmarks, and evaluation workflows across drug discovery tasks. Links: \href{https://tdcommons.ai}{docs} | \href{https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper/2021/hash/6a8d3b0f5987e0f6d3d2f5f65f02e3cc-Abstract.html}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/HowieHwong/TrustLLM}{TrustLLM}} (\textit{Benchmark / Toolkit}; updated Jun. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{622 stars}) A trustworthiness benchmark and toolkit for LLMs; collaboration included follow-on NSF-supported development with the core team. Links: \href{https://trustllmbenchmark.github.io/TrustLLM-Website/}{docs} | \href{https://openreview.net/forum?id=bWUU0LwwMp}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/TrustGen/TrustEval-toolkit}{TrustEval-toolkit}} (\textit{Benchmark / Toolkit}; updated Aug. 2025; \textcolor{uscred}{128 stars}) A toolkit and benchmark for evaluating trustworthiness of generative foundation models across LLM, VLM, and text-to-image settings. Links: \href{https://trusteval-docs.readthedocs.io}{docs} | \href{https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.14296}{paper}.
\item \textbf{\href{https://github.com/LabRAI/LangSkills}{LangSkills}} (\textit{Toolkit / Knowledge Base}; updated Mar. 2026; \textcolor{uscred}{117 stars}) An evidence-backed skill library and pipeline for AI agents, with offline searchable bundles distilled from papers and technical sources.
\end{itemize}
\vspace{-0.1in}
}
